# DBBET Partners

> DBBET Partners is the official iGaming affiliate program for DBBET, offering 55% RevShare, $110 CPA, and Hybrid plans with weekly payments and a $30 minimum payout. Target regions include MENA, Asia, and Africa.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://dbbetaff.com/): Affiliate program overview, commissions, and sign-up.
- [About](https://dbbetaff.com/about/): About DBBET Partners and the affiliate program.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://dbbetaff.com/affiliate-disclosure/): Affiliate disclosure and partnership terms.
- [Blog](https://dbbetaff.com/blog/): Affiliate marketing guides, comparisons, and income strategies.
- [Contact](https://dbbetaff.com/contact/): Contact details and support for affiliates.
- [Instruction](https://dbbetaff.com/instruction/): Step-by-step guide to joining and using the affiliate program.
- [Mob Cash](https://dbbetaff.com/mob-cash/): MOB-CASH agent program for cash deposits and withdrawals.
- [Partner Benefits](https://dbbetaff.com/partner-benefits/): Commission plans (55% RevShare, $110 CPA, Hybrid) and partner perks.
- [Privacy](https://dbbetaff.com/privacy/): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://dbbetaff.com/terms/): Terms and conditions.
